'''Wwebyls''' was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who hailed from [[Yn]]. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], he was newly elected to the [[Inner Council]]. He was tiny in stature.<ref name="TNR" />

{{Char-stub}}
